name: dev-squad
description: Full-stack dev team agent swarm with 8 specialized agents and zero-to-ship capability. Agents: coordinator (opus), architect (opus), backend (sonnet), frontend (sonnet), reviewer/security-lead (sonnet), devops (sonnet), git-ops (sonnet). Supports zero-to-ship project builds, feature development, database tasks, bug fixes, architecture changes, security audits, and infrastructure work.
